title: Scale of Liliths Head and Command Center FoI
display_title: Scale of Liliths Head and Command Center FoI
wikitext:
[]: Scale of Lilith's Head & Command Center FoI             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Tue Nov 24, 2015 8:43 pm I noticed something kind of peculiar while gathering screencaps from 3.0. Remember the wide shot of Lilith's severed head in the old Command Center, with the pile of FoIs? SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Nov 25, 2015 3:20 am In the original series, the height of the Evas ranges from about 40m to 200m, depending. Size and scale is rather inconsistent throughout, so I wouldn't read too much into it.

[]:             Quote Post by unz » Wed Nov 25, 2015 5:21 am Emotional scale for "boom" frames. Chess parallells for what is going on in Q. Donno something about the tesseract tectacles.

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Wed Nov 25, 2015 3:17 pm Sachi wrote: In the original series, the height of the Evas ranges from about 40m to 200m, depending. Size and scale is rather inconsistent throughout, so I wouldn't read too much into it.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Nov 25, 2015 3:53 pm BlueBasilisk wrote: In Lilith's case, the head is significantly smaller than the rest of her corpse. You could barely fit Mark.06 inside the Command Center at its new size, and the rest of her is like a city block.

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Wed Nov 25, 2015 6:46 pm Uhhh....maybe they formed from blood spraying from Lilith's neck/head and were killed by the head chopper before they could grow bigger? And then Nerv stuffed Mark.06 into her neck to plug up the blood fountain? That's more or less what I was talking about in my first post with regards to Lilith's head. I was just really surprised to see such a large discrepancy between the head and body's sizes. Don't know if there's anything useful we can glean from any of this, but it seemed like it was worth noting!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Nov 26, 2015 12:47 am Oh, yeah, now I see you did mention most of what I then proceeded to needlessly reiterate. Doh. Looking at Eva-01 inside the Command Center, it seems to me that she's definitely smaller than Lilith's head, only coming up to about Lilith's nose. So no problems there. (What bothers ME there more than anything else is the decapitated head looking like Rei while the rest of the body does not...) With regard to the FoIs, it occurs to me that we've only been assuming that they're Eva-sized, but is there really anything to support that? Aside from the mysterious skulls in Central Dogma assumed to belong to them, anyway.* (How the hell is that even supposed to work, anyway? The FoIs are made completely of core material -- we see cross sections of them! There's no clean white bones inside! And if those are their skulls, where the hell are the mandibles? Why are the bodies fully covered in armor but the heads nothing but stripped-down crania? And human-shaped rather than Eva-shaped skulls at that? Gah! Fuck the FoI.)

[]:             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Thu Nov 26, 2015 4:35 am Most likely is that the FoI were originally organic like the rest of the EVA's and only after Liliths decapitation did they turn to core

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Nov 26, 2015 4:41 am Arcadia's legacy wrote: Most likely is that the FoI were originally organic like the rest of the EVA's and only after Liliths decapitation did they turn to core

[]:             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Thu Nov 26, 2015 4:55 am Maybe this'll help http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/14723/Speculation-a-new-take-on-the-Failures-of-Infinity/

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Nov 26, 2015 5:17 am I've seen the thread before, and far from being conclusive in any way it just seems to solidify my impression that we have no idea what the fuck is going on.

[]:             Quote Post by unz » Thu Nov 26, 2015 8:09 am I kind of want to read it but I'd probably have to pick the anima thread first. I'm more interested with what fois mean to megarei and what they have done with her clones. FoI probably mark different intrumentalities given different layers of them or at least I guess that's it, who tried to take megarei's feminine power of creation?

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Thu Nov 26, 2015 9:52 am Reichu wrote: I've seen the thread before, and far from being conclusive in any way it just seems to solidify my impression that we have no idea what the fuck is going on.

[]:             Quote Post by unz » Thu Nov 26, 2015 11:44 am To me it's dramatic scaling. Some hole you want to dig out from both agoraphobia and claustrophobia so after an emotional boom frame the hero gets smaller and smaller as 13 flies up and the biggest halos ever pop up. Is there a general thread about third impact?
